declare void @use(i32)

define i32 @select_of_symmetric_selects_multi_use1(i32 %a, i32 %b, i1 %c1, i1 %c2) {

  %sel2 = select i1 %c1, i32 %b, i32 %a
  call void @use(i32 %sel2)
  %ret = select i1 %c2, i32 %sel1, i32 %sel2
  ret i32 %ret
}

}
